title: SimpleAuth
description: Probably the easiest to use authentication plugin.
body:
**SimpleAuth** - Minecraft plugin that will allow you to protect your players' accounts! Simple configuration, reliable use.
## Capabilities & Features
- Easy setup
- Verification by IP Address
- Login & Registartion
- Sessions

## Commands
```/login```, ```/register```, ```/simpleauth```, ```/changepassword```

## Permissions
```simpleauth.reload```
